headers.Content-Security-Policy: default-src 'self' *;script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' 'wasm-unsafe-eval' *;img-src 'self' data: *;connect-src 'self' *;worker-src 'self' blob: *;frame-src 'self' *;frame-ancestors 'self' *;base-uri 'self';font-src 'self' https: data:;form-action 'self';object-src 'none';script-src-attr 'none';style-src 'self' https: 'unsafe-inline';upgrade-insecure-requests
